challenges.title: Commented Code
challenges.description: Create HTML with a visible paragraph containing any text, and an HTML comment explaining what the paragraph does. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '

' in html.lower() or '

element' assert '

' in html.lower(), 'Should close the

element' assert '' in html, 'Should close the HTML comment'
hints: HTML comments start with <!-- and end with -->
Comments are not displayed in the browser but are visible in the source code

challenges.title: Comment Sections
challenges.description: Create HTML with two sections (using <section> tags), each preceded by a comment describing the section's purpose. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code:
assert html.lower().count('<section') >= 2, 'Should contain at least 2 <section> elements'
assert html.lower().count('</section>') >= 2, 'Should close both <section> elements'
assert html.count('<!--') >= 2, 'Should contain at least 2 HTML comments'
assert html.count('-->') >= 2, 'Should close both HTML comments'
hints: Each section should have a comment explaining its purpose
